plugins.name: agent-team
plugins.description: A domain-agnostic agent-team scaffold built around the Planner → Generator → Evaluator loop. Reusable role agents (planner, generator, evaluator, design-evaluator, coordinator) and a reference end-to-end workflow with slash commands. Local-first; the same agents deploy headless to Claude Managed Agents via scripts/cma. Copy it and fill in your vertical.
